columns.extraction_plan: The secondary efficacy end points are explicitly listed in the 'Study Assessments' section on page 3. These include: time to castration-resistant prostate cancer, time to pain progression, symptomatic skeletal event-free survival, time to first symptomatic-skeletal event, time to initiation of subsequent systemic antineoplastic therapy, time to worsening of disease-related physical symptoms, and time to initiation of opioid use for 7 or more days. Table 2 on page 8 provides the results for these secondary endpoints.
